mnemonics.title: Apriori Steps
mnemonics.content: All People Require Ice-Cream Often: 1. Apriori-gen 2. Prune 3. Join 4. Count 5. Output

acronyms.usage: Efficient frequent itemset mining without candidate generation

visualTips.visualization: Imagine tree branches splitting based on maximum information gain at each node

analogies.analogy: Like sorting hats assigning students to houses based on similarity
